allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('data/archive.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\)\); items=d.get\('items',[]\); print\('total:',len\(items\)\); item=items[0] if items else {}; print\(json.dumps\({k:type\(v\).__name__ for k,v in item.items\(\)}, indent=2\)\); print\('---keys---'\); print\(list\(item.keys\(\)\)\); print\('---sample---'\); print\(json.dumps\(item, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
